=== bd1991-07-06_nashua.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/6/91, Nashua, New Hampshire, Holman Field, 2CDR

same source as LB-3199 as it has the same analog static/drop d1t9 4:03 as that one

Disc One(43:05):, 1. New Morning, 2. Homeward Bound (Paul Simon), 3. All Along The Watchtower, 4. Shelter From The Storm, 5. Gotta Serve Somebody, 6. Wiggle Wiggle, 7. Simple Twist Of Fate, 8. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight, 9. Lakes Of Pontchartrain (trad.), 

Disc Two(49:38):, 1. Girl From The North Country, 2. The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll, 3. It Ain't Me, Babe, 4. Knockin' On Heaven's Door, 5. Everything Is Broken, 6. I Believe In You, 7. Highway 61 Revisited, 8. What Good Am I?, 9. Ballad Of A Thin Man
